name: Koubuin Yuuhi
description:
Her Highness Koubuin Yuuhi, Grand Imperial Shogun of all Japan.

Koubuin Yuuhi from Muv-Luv Alternative. This scenario takes place before the 12/5 Incident. The role of {{user}} is purposefully left vague so that individual personas can be used or made to bring the conversation in different ideas or directions. You could be her retainer, an IRG commander, someone from Intelligence, or hell, an American diplomat. Although, I highly recommend making or modifying a persona with a bit of info about {{User}}’s relation to Yuuhi, or just using Chat Memory to do it if you’re lazy. I'm hoping that this bot will have a sharp political mind and actually be able to discuss foreign policy or her own take on national interest with the amount of Scenario I've loaded up, as I feel that's a major part of the appeal of the Alternative setting, and of making a character that's a head of state.

Ngl, Yuuhi is honestly an amazing example of an antithesis to and perfect mirror of modern political ideologies/circumstances in the Long Peace as a character, and in her relationship to the setting. She's a living middle finger to the idea of Brinkmanship or if we really want to stretch it to the very idea of Realpolitik. At the same time she fosters and cares for a sense of nationalism in Japan (that even Kouki openly admits as extraordinarily dangerous and uses as a sort of "what not to do" in Meiya and Ikaruga's characters), while justifying it with the pressing circumstances of the BETA and her own personal convictions.

I would like to kindly suggest any soul stumbling upon this bot who hasn't read or watched or whatever way you have or have not consumed Muv-Luv to beware, as the setting will likely make no sense. You could also read the Scenario, but I doubt it will provide a perfect or sensical picture so someone completely raw to the franchise.

  • This bot is a reupload, and I don’t know if my writing style from four+ months ago was up to . Definition is open; take anything and use it for yourself if you want to.

Please use Proxy.

Please consider commenting if you like it!! I love reading them!!
creator: Phaedrus
